description: Letter from Samḥūn b. Dāwūd ibn al-Siqillī (Qayrawān) to Yosef b. Yaʿaqov b. ʿAwkal (Fustat). The letter deals with a conflict between the sender and the recipient over a consignment of brazilwood, which Samḥūn b. Daʿūd sent to Spain against the instructions of Yosef b. ʿAwkal. This caused a delay in payments and a break of contact between the two. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 644.)
description_he: מכתב מסמחון בן דאוד אבן אל-סיקילי מקירואן ליוסף בן יעקב בן עוקאל בפוסטאט, בסכסוך על משלוח עץ צבע לספרד.
